title: Start to Start Dependencies
excerpt:
Having a Start-Start Dependencies is a real thing in projects. So very often we see multiple tasks that need to start at the same time based on the start of another task.

posts.author: ECO_Blair (Blair Cole)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having a Start-Start Dependencies is a real thing in projects. So very often we see multiple tasks that need to start at the same time based on the start of another task.

This is a must have to make the Gantt charts truly accurate.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ECO_Blair

The standard dependencies in monday are missing a number of features you expect for making it a planning tool. The app SchedulerPro (see https://monday.com/marketplace/10000139) from our partner Work Perfect (contact @Shamika_Khedkar) solves all of those. It supports:

  • all 4 dependency types (SF, SS, FF and FS)
  • configurable workdays of the week
  • configurable holiday blackout dates
